# Waqr Field

**Summary**: An oil field in eastern Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] analyzed the unayzah-formation within the waqr-field.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] Arabian Basin

## Formations Present

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] unayzah-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The formation in this field shows a range of porosity from 1% to 15%. ([[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002, p. 56]])
